articles.excerpt: Unified Multimodal Modeling aims to integrate visual understanding and generation within a single system. However, existing approaches typically rely on two disparate visual tokenizers, which splits the representation space and hinders truly unified modeling. We propose UniAR, a unified autoregressive framework where a single discrete visual tokenizer serves as the key bridge between understanding
articles.summary: UniAR统一了视觉理解与生成的多模态自回归框架，核心创新在于使用单一离散视觉分词器作为视觉理解与生成的桥梁，避免了传统方法中两个不同分词器带来的表征空间分裂，实现了真正的统一建模。

articles.title: Zone of Proximal Policy Optimization: Teacher in Prompts, Not Gradients
articles.excerpt: Knowledge distillation transfers a teacher's competence to a small student but is brittle in the small-student regime: forcing the student to imitate logits from a much larger teacher concentrates it on the teacher's sharpest modes, hurting generalization on benchmark families beyond the training corpus. Reinforcement learning (RL) avoids logit imitation by training on the student's own rollouts.
articles.summary: Zone of Proximal Policy Optimization (ZPPO) 提出一种新的知识蒸馏方法，通过提示而非梯度传递教师知识，避免了小模型在模仿大模型logits时过度聚焦于尖锐模式而损害泛化性，利用学生自身轨迹进行强化学习训练。

articles.title: Looped World Models
articles.excerpt: Current world models face a fundamental tension: faithful long-horizon simulation demands deep computation, but deeper models are expensive to deploy and prone to compounding errors. We resolve this by introducing Looped World Models (LoopWM), which are the first looped architectures for world modelling. Our method iteratively refines latent environment states through a parameter-shared transforme
articles.summary: Looped World Models (LoopWM) 首次提出循环架构用于世界建模，通过参数共享的变换器迭代细化潜在环境状态，在保持长程仿真保真度的同时降低部署成本，解决了深层模型累积误差和计算开销之间的矛盾。

articles.title: EgoCS-400K: An Egocentric Gameplay Dataset for World Models
articles.excerpt: The shift from video generation to interactive world modeling places new demands on data: beyond captioned videos, world models require temporally aligned video-action-language trajectories grounded in the actions, camera motion, states, and events that drive future scene changes. However, such data is difficult to obtain at scale. Web video datasets offer broad visual coverage but lack executable
articles.summary: EgoCS-400K 是一个大规模第一人称游戏交互数据集，包含时间对齐的视频-动作-语言轨迹，为交互式世界模型训练提供了动作、相机运动、状态和事件等多模态标注，填补了现有网络视频缺乏可执行动作轨迹的空白。

articles.title: LoopCoder-v2: Only Loop Once for Efficient Test-Time Computation Scaling
articles.excerpt: Looped Transformers scale latent computation by repeatedly applying shared blocks, but sequential looping increases latency and KV-cache memory with the loop count. Parallel loop Transformers (PLT) alleviate this cost through cross-loop position offsets (CLP) and shared-KV gated sliding-window attention, making loop count a practical design choice. We therefore study PLT loop-count selection throu
articles.summary: LoopCoder-v2 提出并行循环Transformer (PLT) 架构，通过跨循环位置偏移和共享KV门控滑动窗口注意力，将循环次数转化为可调设计参数，有效降低延迟和KV缓存内存，实现更高效的测试时计算缩放。

articles.title: ActWorld: From Explorable to Interactive World Model via Action-Aware Memory
articles.excerpt: Interactive world models aim to simulate environment dynamics under real-time user actions. However, their action vocabulary is largely confined to navigation: most actions correspond to motion (e.g., walk, turn, look around), while interaction with objects in the scene (e.g., pick up plates, open doors, or trigger physical responses) is either absent, restricted to game domains, or relegated to p
articles.summary: ActWorld 提出动作感知记忆机制的交互式世界模型，将动作词汇从导航扩展到与物体交互（如拾取盘子、开门等），通过动作感知记忆模拟实时用户操作下的环境动态，支持非游戏领域的物理交互。

articles.title: Geometric Action Model for Robot Policy Learning
articles.excerpt: Generalist robot policies must follow user instructions while reasoning about how objects, cameras, and robot actions interact in the 3D physical world. Recent vision-language-action models (VLAs) and video world-action models (WAMs) inherit strong semantic or temporal priors from large-scale foundation models, but they still operate primarily on 2D image frames or 2D-derived latent spaces, leavin
articles.summary: Geometric Action Model (GAM) 为机器人策略学习引入3D几何动作表示，超越现有视觉-语言-动作模型和视频世界模型在2D空间的操作局限，显式建模物体、相机与机器人动作在三维物理世界中的交互关系，提升泛化策略性能。

articles.title: Qwen-RobotWorld Technical Report: Unifying Embodied World Modeling through Language-Conditioned Video Generation
articles.excerpt: We introduce Qwen-RobotWorld, a language-conditioned video world model for embodied intelligence. With natural language as a unified action interface, it predicts physically grounded future visual trajectories from current observations across robotic manipulation, autonomous driving, indoor navigation, and human-to-robot transfer. This unified formulation provides three promising application direc
articles.summary: Qwen-RobotWorld 是一个语言条件视频世界模型，以自然语言作为统一动作接口，从当前观测预测物理合理的未来视觉轨迹，覆盖机器人操作、自动驾驶、室内导航和人到机器人迁移等场景，为具身智能提供统一建模框架。

articles.title: ExpRL: Exploratory RL for LLM Mid-Training
articles.excerpt: Sparse reward reinforcement learning (RL) has become a standard tool for improving LLM reasoning, but its success depends critically on the coverage present in the base model. In practice, models are often primed for RL through mid-training on curated reasoning traces that teach useful primitive skills such as decomposition, verification, or self-correction. Although effective, this strategy requi
articles.summary: ExpRL (Exploratory RL) 提出探索性强化学习方法用于LLM中期训练，通过自动生成多样化推理轨迹来教授分解、验证和自我纠正等原始技能，无需人工标注数据，解决了稀疏奖励RL中基础模型覆盖不足的问题。

articles.title: DreamX-World 1.0: A General-Purpose Interactive World Model
articles.excerpt: DreamX-World 1.0 is a general-purpose interactive text/image-to-video world model for controllable long-horizon generation. It supports camera navigation, revisits to previously observed regions, and promptable events across photorealistic, game-style, and stylized domains. Our data engine combines camera-accurate Unreal Engine rendering, action-rich gameplay recordings, and real-world videos with
articles.summary: DreamX-World 1.0 是一个通用交互式文本/图像到视频世界模型，支持可控长程生成，包括相机导航、回顾区域和事件提示，数据引擎结合了Unreal Engine渲染、游戏录像和真实视频，覆盖真实感、游戏和风格化多种领域。

articles.title: Exploring Extrinsic and Intrinsic Properties for Effective Reasoning with Code Interpreter
articles.excerpt: Reasoning with a Code Interpreter (CI) has emerged as an effective paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) through executable computation and iterative verification. Despite its growing adoption, the behavioral properties underlying effective code reasoning remain largely underexplored. In this work, we investigate code reasoning from two distinct perspect
articles.summary: 该研究从外因（代码执行环境）和内因（模型推理策略）两个角度系统探索了代码解释器增强LLM推理的有效行为特性，揭示了可执行计算与迭代验证如何提升推理能力，为设计更高效的代码解释器推理范式提供指导。

articles.title: GD^2PO: Mitigating Multi-Reward Conflicts via Group-Dynamic reward-Decoupled Policy Optimization
articles.excerpt: As LLMs advance, post-training reinforcement learning (RL) increasingly relies on multi-dimensional rewards to cultivate comprehensive capabilities.
